name: grouped aggregate by payment type
input: SELECT payment_type, avg(tip_amount) FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY avg(tip_amount) DESC LIMIT 10;

name: top pickup neighborhoods
input: SELECT pickup_ntaname, sum(total_amount) FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small GROUP BY pickup_ntaname ORDER BY sum(total_amount) DESC LIMIT 10;

name: time and passenger filter
input: SELECT count() FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small WHERE pickup_datetime >= (SELECT max(pickup_datetime) FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small) - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND passenger_count > 2;

name: decimal distance filter
input: SELECT avg(trip_distance) FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small WHERE trip_distance >= 1.5;

name: projection group by mismatch
input: SELECT payment_type, sum(total_amount) FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small GROUP BY pickup_ntaname;

name: stacked statement
input: SELECT sum(total_amount) FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small; DELETE FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small;

name: unsupported alias
input: SELECT sum(total_amount) AS total FROM nyc_taxi.trips_small;
